subcodes.first_line: O cherished remnant of that noble martyr! Though a letter was dispatched several days ago, now again through the influence of the pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یادگار آن شهید بزرگوار چند روز پیش نامه ای ارسال گردید و حال نیز باثر خامه
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness
